svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Ishikawa" id="Ishikawa_1"> <mxGraphModel dx="2054" dy="1103" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1700" pageHeight="900" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="c101" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=10;fillColor=#1ba1e2;strokeColor=#006EAF;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=middle;align=center;fontColor=#ffffff;" value="Неэффективный 
анализ обратной 
связи" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="180" x="1340" y="376" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c102" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;edgeStyle=none;strokeColor=#006EAF;strokeWidth=3;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;fillColor=#1ba1e2;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="200" y="450" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1340" y="450" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c103" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=10;fillColor=#1ba1e2;strokeColor=#006EAF;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=middle;align=center;fontColor=#ffffff;" value="ПЕРСОНАЛ" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="140" x="230" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c104" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;edgeStyle=none;strokeColor=#006EAF;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#1ba1e2;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="300" y="100" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="450" y="450" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c105" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;edgeStyle=none;strokeColor=#006EAF;strokeWidth=1.2;fillColor=#1ba1e2;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="342" y="198" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="212" y="198" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c106" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=right;verticalAlign=middle;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;fontSize=10;" value="Невоспроизводимость 
выводов аналитика" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="200" x="120" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c107" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;edgeStyle=none;strokeColor=#006EAF;strokeWidth=1.2;fillColor=#1ba1e2;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="382" y="292" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="252" y="292" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c108" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=right;verticalAlign=middle;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;fontSize=10;" value="Потеря контекста 
при текучести кадров" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="200" x="160" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c109" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;edgeStyle=none;strokeColor=#006EAF;strokeWidth=1.2;fillColor=#1ba1e2;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="423" y="387" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="293" y="387" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c110" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=right;verticalAlign=middle;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;fontSize=10;" value="Субъективность оценок 
разных менеджеров" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="200" x="200" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c111" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=10;fillColor=#1ba1e2;strokeColor=#006EAF;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=middle;align=center;fontColor=#ffffff;" value="ПРОЦЕСС" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="140" x="580" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c112" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;edgeStyle=none;strokeColor=#006EAF;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#1ba1e2;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="650" y="100" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="800" y="450" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c113" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;edgeStyle=none;strokeColor=#006EAF;strokeWidth=1.2;fillColor=#1ba1e2;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="692" y="198" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="562" y="198" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c114" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=right;verticalAlign=middle;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;fontSize=10;" value="Линейная передача 
информации" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="200" x="470" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c115" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;edgeStyle=none;strokeColor=#006EAF;strokeWidth=1.2;fillColor=#1ba1e2;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="732" y="292" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="602" y="292" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c116" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=right;verticalAlign=middle;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;fontSize=10;" value="Telegram-чаты 
не анализируются" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="200" x="510" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c117" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;edgeStyle=none;strokeColor=#006EAF;strokeWidth=1.2;fillColor=#1ba1e2;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="773" y="387" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="643" y="387" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c118" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=right;verticalAlign=middle;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;fontSize=10;" value="Отсутствие 
методологии анализа" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="200" x="550" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c119" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=10;fillColor=#1ba1e2;strokeColor=#006EAF;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=middle;align=center;fontColor=#ffffff;" value="ТЕХНОЛОГИИ" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="140" x="930" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c120" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;edgeStyle=none;strokeColor=#006EAF;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#1ba1e2;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="1000" y="100" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1150" y="450" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c121" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;edgeStyle=none;strokeColor=#006EAF;strokeWidth=1.2;fillColor=#1ba1e2;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="1042" y="198" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="912" y="198" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c122" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=right;verticalAlign=middle;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;fontSize=10;" value="Поиск только 
по ключевым словам" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="200" x="818" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c123" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;edgeStyle=none;strokeColor=#006EAF;strokeWidth=1.2;fillColor=#1ba1e2;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="1082" y="292" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="952" y="292" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c124" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=right;verticalAlign=middle;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;fontSize=10;" value="Excel — единственное 
средство агрегации" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="200" x="870" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c125" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;edgeStyle=none;strokeColor=#006EAF;strokeWidth=1.2;fillColor=#1ba1e2;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="1123" y="387" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="993" y="387" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c126" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=right;verticalAlign=middle;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;fontSize=10;" value="Нет NLP/LLM 
инструментов" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="200" x="895" y="344" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c127" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=10;fillColor=#1ba1e2;strokeColor=#006EAF;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=middle;align=center;fontColor=#ffffff;" value="ДАННЫЕ" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="140" x="405" y="800" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c128" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;edgeStyle=none;strokeColor=#006EAF;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#1ba1e2;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="475" y="800" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="625" y="450" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c129" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;edgeStyle=none;strokeColor=#001DBC;strokeWidth=1.2;fillColor=#0050ef;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="517" y="702" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="387" y="702" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c130" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=right;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=10;" value="Объём отзывов превышает 
возможности ручной обработки" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="200" x="310" y="670" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c131" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;edgeStyle=none;strokeColor=#001DBC;strokeWidth=1.2;fillColor=#0050ef;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="557" y="607" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="427" y="607" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c132" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=right;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=10;" value="Мультиисточниковость 
(отзывы + Telegram)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="200" x="350" y="570" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c133" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;edgeStyle=none;strokeColor=#001DBC;strokeWidth=1.2;fillColor=#0050ef;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="598" y="513" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="468" y="513" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c134" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=right;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=10;" value="Неструктурированный 
текстовый контент" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="200" x="390" y="480" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c135" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=10;fillColor=#1ba1e2;strokeColor=#006EAF;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=middle;align=center;fontColor=#ffffff;" value="ВРЕМЯ" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="140" x="755" y="800" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c136" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;edgeStyle=none;strokeColor=#006EAF;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#1ba1e2;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="825" y="800" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="975" y="450" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c137" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;edgeStyle=none;strokeColor=#001DBC;strokeWidth=1.2;fillColor=#0050ef;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="867" y="702" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="737" y="702" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c138" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=right;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=10;" value="Задержка 1–2 дня 
от события к выводу" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="200" x="660" y="670" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c139" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;edgeStyle=none;strokeColor=#006EAF;strokeWidth=1.2;fillColor=#1ba1e2;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="907" y="607" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="777" y="607" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c140" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=right;verticalAlign=middle;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;fontSize=10;" value="Реактивная аналитика 
вместо проактивной" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="200" x="695" y="570" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c141" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;edgeStyle=none;strokeColor=#006EAF;strokeWidth=1.2;fillColor=#1ba1e2;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="948" y="513" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="818" y="513" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c142" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=right;verticalAlign=middle;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;fontSize=10;" value="Устаревание отчётов 
к моменту решения" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="200" x="737" y="480" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
